title: Trashapack
description: A data pack that enables players to clean up trash from their inventory.
body:
This data pack adds a barrier sign in the last slot of the inventory.

How to delete items in Survival and Adventure mode:
1. Click on the item you want to delete;
2. Place the item on the position where the barrier sign is located;
3. The item will be successfully deleted.

This data pack supports both Chinese and English.

This data pack has been successfully ported to a Mod.

Warning: Please no longer use version 1.0.2 of this packet! There will be some unexpected bugs!


这个数据包在背包的最后一格添加了一个屏障标志。

如何在生存、冒险模式下删除物品：
1. 点击要删除的物品；
2. 将物品放在屏障标志所在的位置；
3. 成功删除。

此数据包支持中文和英文。

已移植此数据包为模组。

警告：此数据包的1.0.2版本请不再使用！会出现一些意想不到的bug！
